original_image_tags: Aged, tan-colored document page with significant wear and discoloration. The left edge is torn and irregular. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The paper shows faint, ghosted text from the reverse side or a preceding page, but no primary legible text is present on this side.

elements.description: An upside-down blue ink stamp with the text 'RECEIVED', a date or time including '04 12 4 58 PM', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', and 'F.B.I.' visible.

judge.reason: Description A describes a worn, blank paper page with no legible primary content, while Description B describes a specific blue ink stamp with quoted text, indicating they are describing different visual content or one is hallucinating.
